---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused product or developer experience improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What repeated user, contributor, operator, or security problem does this solve?

## Proposed Outcome

What should be true after the change?

## Scope

What should be included?

## Non-Goals

What should not be included?

## Security Impact

How does this affect authorization, auditability, revocation, secrets, or blast
radius?

## Compatibility Impact

Does this affect existing commands, config, schemas, receipts, APIs, or adapter
behavior?
